caption: In a clinical simulation setting, three people are gathered around a patient lying in a hospital bed. A woman in blue scrubs, wearing a black mask and a stethoscope around her neck, stands on the left, leaning forward as she uses a stethoscope to listen to the patient. Next to her, another woman in blue scrubs and a black mask is also leaning in, reaching toward the patient with gloved blue hands. A third woman, wearing a dark grey polo shirt, a light blue surgical mask, and a stethoscope, stands on the right, observing the procedure while wearing blue gloves. The room contains a light-colored wall, a doorway, and a green chair in the background. On-screen text in each frame includes a pink figure icon with the words "Day 1" and a logo accompanied by the text "Sim Week". The scene remains largely static across the frames, with only slight movements in the posture and hand positions of the medical staff.
